theme.title: Get FUCKING Treasured
theme.subtitle: A rainbow phoenix spa oracle for treasuring Valkyrie, yourselves, and each other.
theme.aesthetic: Fire Bird rainbow phoenix luxury spa altar

story.premise: Valkyrie is the Fire Bird at the center of a home-spa treasure rite. Guests arrive as high-quality humans and cryptids bringing warmth, attention, care, and embodied delight.
story.invocation: Treasure Valkyrie. Treasure yourselves. Treasure each other.

beats.title: Enter the Spa Altar
beats.body: Claim your player name, robe energy, and intention for the room.

beats.title: Draw a Spark
beats.body: Shuffle the oracle, reveal a sign, and notice what kind of care wants to move.

beats.title: Pass the Flame
beats.body: Send cards to friends when a prompt feels like theirs to answer.

beats.title: Leave an Offering
beats.body: Use the Shared Altar for blessings, memories, jokes, public answers, and treasures.

beats.title: Gather the Keepsake
beats.body: Save the notes, cards, and answers that touched you into your deck.

party.host_note: Bring yourself, a towel, your most luxurious robe, and your inner pamperer. No lavender, no nuts, and body-positive spa energy only. Times are a real flow now, but still soft enough for check-ins and treasure interruptions.

schedule.title: Doors open
schedule.details: Arrival, robes, sign-in, settle in, and first sparks.

schedule.title: Snacks and virgin mimosas
schedule.details: Land gently, nibble, sip, and ease into the room.

schedule.title: Microdosing intention circle and drop
schedule.details: Optional intention setting, harm reduction, limits, and gentle relational landing for anyone partaking.

schedule.title: Hottub hotseat
schedule.details: A receiving moment in the water for warmth, presence, and playful attention.

schedule.title: Showers
schedule.details: Rinse, reset, and transition into the scrub sequence.

schedule.title: Group salt scrub and exfoliate
schedule.details: Shared body-care ritual with consent, care, and treasure energy.

schedule.title: Face masks, robes, and start fire
schedule.details: Mask up, robe up, and shift into the softer fire-side arc of the evening.

schedule.title: Cucumber over eyes, hot face towels
schedule.details: Extra spa softness and sensory downshift.

schedule.title: Sushi and mocktail service
schedule.details: Nourishment lands: sushi, vegetarian sushi, mocktails, juice, and tasty care.

schedule.title: Kyr as sushi platter
schedule.details: One piece for each year, with receiving at the center of the ritual.

schedule.title: Partner stretching, massage gun, lounging, and stories about Kyr
schedule.details: Body care, stretching, massage tools, lounging, and story-sharing about the guest of honor.

schedule.title: Birthday spankings? Birthday dance jam?
schedule.details: Possible playful branch depending on consent, mood, and the room.

schedule.title: One full round of 3-Minute Game
schedule.details: Facilitated by someone other than Kyr so the Fire Bird gets to receive.

schedule.title: Group cuddle puddle
schedule.details: Soft landing, closeness, and end-of-night treasure energy.

schedule.title: Goodnight
schedule.details: Close the rite and send people home warm.

suit.name: Valkyrie
suit.domain: Bless the hero in the room

cards.title: The Door Opens
cards.prompt: What blessing should follow Valkyrie into this next year?
cards.flavor: Every good party begins when someone lets the future enter wearing shoes.

suit.domain: Bless the hero in the room

cards.title: The True Name
cards.prompt: What is one thing Valkyrie should never forget about who they are?
cards.flavor: A true name is not a label. It is a room with all the lights on.

cards.title: The Side Quest
cards.prompt: Give Valkyrie a tiny quest for the year ahead.
cards.flavor: The main story gets jealous when the side quests are this good.

cards.flavor: Some enchantments are cast with frosting.

cards.title: The Laughing Shield
cards.prompt: What ridiculous power should protect Valkyrie from boring days?
cards.flavor: A shield made of laughter still counts as armor.

cards.title: The Friendship Signal
cards.prompt: Write the bat-signal version of how Valkyrie can summon their people.
cards.flavor: The right people know the shape of your flare.

cards.title: The Treasure Chest
cards.prompt: What treasure has Valkyrie already been carrying?
cards.flavor: Some treasure is not hidden. It is simply undernamed.

cards.title: The Future Crown
cards.prompt: What should Valkyrie become wildly confident about?
cards.flavor: A crown can be a posture before it is an object.

cards.title: The Secret Door
cards.prompt: What new door should open for Valkyrie this year?
cards.flavor: The secret door was waiting for someone dramatic enough to notice it.

cards.title: The Party Spell
cards.prompt: Write a one-sentence spell for the party to cast together.
cards.flavor: A room full of people saying yes can become weather.

cards.title: The First Try
cards.prompt: What should Valkyrie try even if they are not good at it yet?
cards.flavor: The first try is already a small form of bravery.

cards.title: The Room That Knows
cards.prompt: What does everyone here know is wonderful about Valkyrie?
cards.flavor: Some truths get louder when the whole room holds them.
